quote: Don't worry about being successful, but work toward being significant and the success will naturally follow. – Oprah Winfrey
fact: Celery has negative calories! It takes more calories to eat a piece of celery than the celery has in it.
joke: Some people say that comedians who tell one too many light bulb jokes soon burn out, but they don't know watt they are talking about. They're not that bright.
